CONTENT.Club career: Ulrich joined the VfB Stuttgart academy in 2016, from Nattheim.He signed a long-term contract with the club in the summer of 2022, after having been linked with a move to Bayern Munich. According to sports magazine Kicker, the extended contract runs until 2026.Ulrich made his professional debut for VfB Stuttgart on the 12 November 2022.On 18 June 2024, Ulrich joined newly-promoted 2. Bundesliga side SSV Ulm on a one-year loan deal.
CONTENT.External links: Laurin Ulrich at SoccerwayLaurin Ulrich at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Ulrich is a youth international for Germany, first receiving a call with the under-16 in October 2020. He later went on to captain the German under-17 team.

SUMMARY: Laurin Ulrich (born 31 January 2005) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for SSV Ulm on loan from Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart.
